_notes.source: OSE wiki FreeCAD files — individual component files (not master assembly)
gaps: RAMPS 1.4: body labels unknown until FCStd is inspected. Likely single compound body.
Power supply: likely single body (housing only — no internal PCB detail).
Smart Controller: may have 2 bodies (PCB + housing). Inspect first.
Control Panel: may have multiple bodies (enclosure + cutouts + mounting tabs). Inspect first.
Positions within D3D frame: NOT in these files. Author from Final Assembly PDF §25-47 or physical measurement.
workflow: 2. Run extract_placements.py — populates placements.json with bounding sizes
4. Import in Unity, verify orientation via §9.8.2 audit
5. Author playPosition in machine.json from Final Assembly PDF frame dimensions
6. Update this file with confirmed FreeCAD label → partId mappings
